payload.content:
Follow the style of these three worked examples:

Example 1 (aggregation) — Table: Player,Points; Alice,10; Bob,15; Carol,20. Q: What is the total points scored? Reasoning: 10 + 15 + 20 = 45. A: 45

Example 2 (count) — Table: Country,Medals; France,3; Spain,2; Italy,5. Q: How many countries won more than 2 medals? Reasoning: France (3) and Italy (5) qualify. A: 2

Example 3 (superlative) — Table: City,Population; Lyon,500k; Paris,2100k; Nice,340k. Q: Which city has the largest population? Reasoning: Paris 2100k > Lyon 500k > Nice 340k. A: Paris
